Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Set For Case Management Conference On Dec-06-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or in The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY ET AL 'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS(MISCALENDARED BY PARTY ON LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR; THIS MOTION BELONGS IN THE DISCVOERY CALENDAR)

Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY ET AL 'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS

No appearances in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Golden Gate University's Motion for Terminating Sanctions is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendant's request for terminating sanctions is denied without prejudice. Plaintiffs shall serve verified, code-compliant discovery responses to the discovery at issue along with responsive documents (if warranted) within two weeks of notice of this order. Defendant's request for monetary sanctions is granted. Sanctions in the amount of $2,332.50 are awarded in favor of Defendant and against Plaintiffs. Sanctions shall be paid within two weeks of notice of entry of this order.

The Proposed Order was sent to the Court prior to hearing for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catanlanotti; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY's Motion To For Terminating Sanctions.

Continued to be heard on the discovery calendar at 9:00 a.m. in Department 301 on July 12, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Set For Trial On Aug-28-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions.

Motion is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs Anthony Garrett, Candis Bell, and Shawn Thomas shall serve code-complaint responses, without objections, to Defendant's General Form Interrogatories, Set One; Defendant's Employment Form Interrogatories, Set One; and Defendant's Request for Production of Documents, Set One, within 14 calendar days of service of notice of entry of this order. Defendant's request for sanction is denied as there is no opposition to the motion. C.C.P. 2030.290(c), 2031.300(c). The Civil Discovery Act does not authorize the trial court to award monetary sanctions under C.C.P. 2023.030 alone or together with C.C.P. 2023.010. City of Los Angeles v. Pricewaterhousecoopers, LLC, 84 Cal. App. 5th 466, 475 (2022).

Order is signed.

Judge Pro William Lynn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
